name: News

task.description: Build a newspaper-style homepage for 'The Daily Ledger' at 1920px wide with a dense multi-column grid. Masthead: centered title 'The Daily Ledger', a date line 'Monday, June 1, 2026', and a horizontal nav of 6 sections (World, Business, Tech, Science, Culture, Opinion). Below, a 12-column-style article grid: a large lead story spanning the left two-thirds (headline, byline, image placeholder, 3-line dek), a right column with 3 stacked secondary stories (headline + 1-line summary, separated by hairlines), and below the fold a row of 4 equal-width 'More headlines' cards. A thin section divider rule separates blocks. Responsive: at 375px everything collapses to a single column in reading order (lead, then secondaries, then the 4 cards).
requirements: A centered masthead shows 'The Daily Ledger', the date line, and a 6-section horizontal nav
A lead story occupies the left two-thirds with a headline, byline, image placeholder, and a multi-line dek
A right column holds exactly three stacked secondary stories separated by hairline rules
Below the fold, four equal-width 'More headlines' cards appear in one row with uniform gaps
The lead column and the right column are top-aligned and do not overlap
Hairline/divider rules are consistent in weight and color (repetition)
Headline typography clearly outranks body/summary text (contrast/hierarchy)
At 375px the entire layout collapses to a single column in the order lead, secondaries, then the four cards
The six nav sections are evenly spaced and aligned on one row on desktop
All six section names and the date line appear exactly as specified

ss_html:
The Daily Ledger

Monday, June 1, 2026
World Business Tech Science Culture Opinion

Global Climate Summit Reaches Historic Agreement on Carbon Reduction Targets

By Sarah Chen and Michael Rodriguez
[Lead Story Image Placeholder]

World leaders from 195 nations signed a groundbreaking accord that commits to reducing global carbon emissions by 60% within the next decade. The agreement includes unprecedented funding mechanisms for developing nations and establishes binding enforcement protocols that environmental experts are calling the most significant climate action in history.

Tech Giants Face New Antitrust Legislation

Congressional committee approves sweeping reforms targeting major technology companies' market dominance and data practices.

Breakthrough in Quantum Computing Achieved

Scientists at MIT demonstrate stable quantum processor capable of solving complex problems 1000 times faster than traditional computers.

Global Markets Rally on Economic Recovery Signs

Stock indices reach new highs as unemployment rates drop and consumer confidence surges across major economies worldwide.

More Headlines

Space Tourism Industry Sees Record Growth

Private space companies report 300% increase in bookings as costs continue to decline and safety records improve.

Revolutionary Gene Therapy Shows Promise

Clinical trials demonstrate 95% success rate in treating previously incurable genetic disorders affecting millions worldwide.

Renewable Energy Surpasses Fossil Fuels

Solar and wind power generation exceeds coal and natural gas for the first time in global energy production history.

AI Assistant Wins Literary Prize

Artificial intelligence program becomes first non-human recipient of prestigious international poetry award, sparking debate about creativity.
rv_html:
The Daily Ledger

Monday, June 1, 2026
World Business Tech Science Culture Opinion

Global Climate Summit Reaches Historic Agreement on Carbon Reduction

By Sarah Chen and Michael Rodriguez
[Lead Story Image Placeholder]
World leaders from 195 nations signed a groundbreaking accord that commits to reducing global carbon emissions by 60% within the next decade. The agreement includes unprecedented funding mechanisms for developing nations and establishes binding enforcement protocols that environmental experts are calling the most significant climate action in history.

Tech Giants Face New Antitrust Legislation

Congress passes bipartisan bill targeting monopolistic practices in the technology sector.

Breakthrough in Quantum Computing Achieved

Scientists demonstrate stable quantum processor capable of solving complex problems in seconds.

Global Markets Rally on Economic Recovery

Stock indices reach record highs as inflation concerns ease and employment rates improve worldwide.

More Headlines

Space Tourism Industry Expands with New Commercial Flights

Three companies announce regular passenger service to low Earth orbit beginning next year.

Revolutionary Gene Therapy Shows Promise for Rare Diseases

Clinical trials demonstrate remarkable success rates in treating previously incurable conditions.

Renewable Energy Surpasses Fossil Fuels in Global Production

Solar and wind power generation reaches milestone, accounting for 52% of worldwide electricity.

Cultural Renaissance Emerges in Post-Pandemic Arts Scene

Museums, theaters, and galleries report record attendance as creative communities flourish.

trace.output:
<think>
Let me build a comprehensive newspaper-style homepage for 'The Daily Ledger' with all the specified requirements.

Key design decisions:
- Classic newspaper aesthetic with serif fonts
- Black/white/dark gray palette with a red accent for the masthead
- Dense multi-column grid using CSS Grid
- Responsive with media query at 375px
- Clean hairline rules throughout

Let me plan the layout:
1. Masthead: centered title, date, 6-section nav
2. Main content area: 12-column grid
   - Lead story: left 2/3 (8 columns)
   - Secondary stories: right 1/3 (4 columns)
3. Below fold: 4 equal cards
4. Divider rules between sections

For fonts, I'll use system serif fonts to keep everything self-contained. Now I'm writing the HTML and CSS to structure the masthead with the title and navigation, then building out the grid-based layout for the stories and cards.

Writing HTML and styles... Writing stylesheet rules... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Writing responsive styles... Building the article layout... Building the news layout... I'm structuring the remaining article cards for the news layout—finishing the Seoul-Pyongyang diplomatic story and adding the NASA Europa Clipper discovery piece about potential subsurface ocean activity. Then wrapping up with the footer showing the publication date. I'm verifying the responsive behavior at 375px—the six nav items should stack into two rows of three with flex-wrap, and I'm double-checking that the mobile layout collapses to a single column while maintaining the typography hierarchy and color palette throughout.
</think>
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>The Daily Ledger</title>
  <style>
    /* ── RESET ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    /* ── BASE ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
    body {
      font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
      background: #f2ede4;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      font-size: 16px;
      line-height: 1.55;
    }

    /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       MASTHEAD
    ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .masthead {
      background: #fff;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 28px 60px 0;
    }

    .masthead-inner {
      border-top: 4px solid #1a1a1a;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;
      padding: 18px 0 16px;
      margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    .site-title {
      font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
      font-size: 80px;
      font-weight: 900;
      letter-spacing: -2px;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      line-height: 1;
      display: block;
    }

    .dateline {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: #777;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1.8px;
      margin-top: 8px;
      display: block;
    }

    /* ── NAV ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .site-nav {
      background: #1a1a1a;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: stretch;
      gap: 0;
    }

    .site-nav a {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #e8e8e8;
      text-decoration: none;
      padding: 13px 40px;
      display: block;
      border-right: 1px solid #333;
      transition: background 0.18s, color 0.18s;
    }

    .site-nav a:first-child { border-left: 1px solid #333; }
    .site-nav a:hover { background: #b80000; color: #fff; }

    /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       CONTENT WRAPPER
    ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .content-wrapper {
      max-width: 1800px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 32px 60px 48px;
    }

    /* ── SECTION LABELS & RULES ─────────────────────────── */
    .section-label {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #b80000;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      display: block;
    }

    .section-rule {
      border: none;
      border-top: 3px double #1a1a1a;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
    }

    .thin-rule {
      border: none;
      border-top: 1px solid #ccc;
      flex: 1;
    }

    /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       MAIN GRID  (lead 2/3 · secondary 1/3)
    ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .main-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
      gap: 0;
      align-items: start;
    }

    /* ── LEAD STORY ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    .lead-story {
      padding-right: 44px;
      border-right: 1px solid #ccc;
    }

    .lead-headline {
      font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
      font-size: 52px;
      font-weight: 700;
      line-height: 1.08;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .lead-byline {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: #888;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.6px;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .lead-byline strong {
      color: #b80000;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    .lead-image-placeholder {
      width: 100%;
      height: 440px;
      background: linear-gradient(160deg, #2c2c2c 0%, #4a4a4a 45%, #777 100%);
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .lead-image-placeholder::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: repeating-linear-gradient(
        -45deg,
        transparent 0px,
        transparent 14px,
        rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 14px,
        rgba(255,255,255,0.04) 28px
      );
    }

    .placeholder-label {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45);
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      z-index: 1;
    }

    .placeholder-sub {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 11px;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
      letter-spacing: 1px;
      margin-top: 6px;
      z-index: 1;
    }

    .lead-dek {
      font-family: Georgia, serif;
      font-size: 19px;
      line-height: 1.65;
      color: #2d2d2d;
      border-left: 4px solid #b80000;
      padding-left: 18px;
    }

    /* ── SECONDARY COLUMN ───────────────────────────────── */
    .secondary-col {
      padding-left: 36px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .secondary-story {
      padding: 22px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;
    }

    .secondary-story:first-child {
      padding-top: 0;
    }

    .secondary-story:last-child {
      border-bottom: none;
      padding-bottom: 0;
    }

    .secondary-tag {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 2.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #b80000;
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: 7px;
    }

    .secondary-headline {
      font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
      font-size: 26px;
      font-weight: 700;
      line-height: 1.2;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .secondary-summary {
      font-family: Georgia, serif;
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.6;
      color: #555;
    }

    /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       BELOW FOLD — 4 CARDS
    ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .below-fold {
      margin-top: 44px;
    }

    .below-fold-header {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 14px;
      margin-bottom: 22px;
    }

    .below-fold-header .section-label {
      margin-bottom: 0;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .cards-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
      gap: 30px;
    }

    .card {
      background: #fff;
      border-top: 3px solid #1a1a1a;
      padding: 22px 20px 22px;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
    }

    .card-tag {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 2.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #b80000;
      display: block;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .card-image-placeholder {
      width: 100%;
      height: 170px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #383838 0%, #6a6a6a 100%);
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
      margin-bottom: 16px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .card-image-placeholder span {
      font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
      font-size: 10px;
      color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    .card-headline {
      font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
      font-size: 22px;
      font-weight: 700;
      line-height: 1.25;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    .card-summary {
      font-family: Georgia, serif;
      font-size: 14px;
      line-height: 1.55;
      color: #666;
      flex: 1;
    }

    /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       FOOTER
    ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    footer {
      background: #1a1a1a;
      color: #aaa;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 28px 60px;
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 12px;
      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
      line-height: 1.8;
      margin-top: 0;
    }

    footer strong { color: #fff; }

    footer .footer-nav {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      gap: 24px;
      margin-top: 10px;
    }

    footer .footer-nav a {
      color: #aaa;
      text-decoration: none;
      font-size: 11px;
      letter-spacing: 1.5px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    footer .footer-nav a:hover { color: #fff; }

    /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       RESPONSIVE — 375 px
    ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    @media (max-width: 480px) {

      .masthead {
        padding: 16px 14px 0;
      }

      .site-title {
        font-size: 36px;
        letter-spacing: -1px;
      }

      .dateline {
        font-size: 10px;
        letter-spacing: 1px;
      }

      .site-nav {
        flex-wrap: wrap;
      }

      .site-nav a {
        flex: 1 1 33%;
        text-align: center;
        padding: 10px 6px;
        font-size: 10px;
        letter-spacing: 1px;
        border-right: 1px solid #333;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #333;
      }

      .site-nav a:first-child { border-left: none; }

      /* ── content ── */
      .content-wrapper {
        padding: 20px 14px 32px;
      }

      /* ── main grid → single column ── */
      .main-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
      }

      /* ── lead ── */
      .lead-story {
        padding-right: 0;
        border-right: none;
        padding-bottom: 28px;
        border-bottom: 3px double #1a1a1a;
        margin-bottom: 0;
      }

      .lead-headline {
        font-size: 30px;
      }

      .lead-image-placeholder {
        height: 210px;
      }

      .lead-dek {
        font-size: 16px;
      }

      /* ── secondaries ── */
      .secondary-col {
        padding-left: 0;
        padding-top: 0;
        margin-top: 0;
        border-top: 3px double #1a1a1a;
      }

      .secondary-headline {
        font-size: 22px;
      }

      /* ── cards ── */
      .below-fold {
        margin-top: 28px;
      }

      .cards-grid {
        grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        gap: 20px;
      }

      .card-image-

… [truncated, 7,588 more characters]

trace.feedback:
Quality score: 70%
DOES NOT MEET REQUIREMENTS

Issues found:
  1. [CRITICAL] Missing 'More headlines' section below the fold - four equal-width cards should appear in one row (at bottom)
  2. [MINOR] Lead story image shows placeholder text instead of actual image content (at center-left)
  3. [MAJOR] Secondary stories in right column lack visible hairline rule separators between them (at right)

Suggested fixes:
  1. Add the missing 'More headlines' section with four equal-width cards below the current content
  2. Add hairline rule separators between the three secondary stories in the right column
  3. Replace image placeholder with actual image content or improve placeholder styling

I should add a visual separator or ensure the below-fold section is clearly distinct and visible.

Now looking at the feedback more carefully, I see there are a few issues to address: the lead story image is just showing placeholder text instead of an actual image, so I'll improve the placeholder styling with a better visual treatment like a gradient or icon to make it look more intentional. For the secondary stories, the CSS already has `border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc` on each story, which should create separators between them, but let me verify the spacing is working correctly. I need to focus on three specific fixes: making sure the cards section below the fold is actually visible by checking for overflow or display issues, improving the image placeholder with better styling like a gradient or icon, and adding clear horizontal dividers between the secondary stories using either CSS borders or HR elements. Let me trace through the HTML structure to confirm the cards are rendering properly. I'm refining the secondary story separators with a more explicit border approach, using a darker line between items and removing redundant bottom borders. Then I'm improving the lead image placeholder to look more photographic with a better gradient effect. </think>
Looking at the three issues, I'll make targeted fixes only:

1. **Cards missing** — reinforce the `.below-fold` block with explicit `display:block` and ensure no overflow clipping hides it; add a background to the cards so they're unmistakable.
2. **Hairline separators** — switch from `border-bottom` (which can collapse) to explicit `border-top` on the 2nd and 3rd secondary stories using an adjacent-sibling rule.
3. **Image placeholder** — replace the flat gradient with a richer landscape-style visual using layered CSS gradients and a pseudo-element silhouette.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>The Daily Ledger</title>
  <style>
    /* ── RESET ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    /* ── BASE ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
    body {
      font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
      background: #f2ede4;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      font-size: 16px;
      line-height: 1.55;
    }

    /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       MASTHEAD
    ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .masthead {
      background: #fff;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 28px 60px 0;
    }

    .masthead-inner {
      border-top: 4px solid #1a1a1a;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;
      padding: 18px 0 16px;
      margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    .site-title {
      font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
      font-size: 80px;
      font-weight: 900;
      letter-spacing: -2px;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      line-height: 1;
      display: block;
    }

    .dateline {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: #777;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1.8px;
      margin-top: 8px;
      display: block;
    }

    /* ── NAV ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .site-nav {
      background: #1a1a1a;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: stretch;
      gap: 0;
    }

    .site-nav a {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 2px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #e8e8e8;
      text-decoration: none;
      padding: 13px 40px;
      display: block;
      border-right: 1px solid #333;
      transition: background 0.18s, color 0.18s;
    }

    .site-nav a:first-child { border-left: 1px solid #333; }
    .site-nav a:hover { background: #b80000; color: #fff; }

    /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       CONTENT WRAPPER
    ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .content-wrapper {
      max-width: 1800px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 32px 60px 48px;
      overflow: visible;
    }

    /* ── SECTION LABELS & RULES ─────────────────────────── */
    .section-label {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 10px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 3px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: #b80000;
      margin-bottom: 6px;
      display: block;
    }

    .section-rule {
      border: none;
      border-top: 3px double #1a1a1a;
      margin-bottom: 28px;
    }

    .thin-rule {
      border: none;
      border-top: 1px solid #ccc;
      flex: 1;
    }

    /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       MAIN GRID  (lead 2/3 · secondary 1/3)
    ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .main-grid {
      display: grid;
      grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
      gap: 0;
      align-items: start;
    }

    /* ── LEAD STORY ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    .lead-story {
      padding-right: 44px;
      border-right: 1px solid #ccc;
    }

    .lead-headline {
      font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
      font-size: 52px;
      font-weight: 700;
      line-height: 1.08;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    .lead-byline {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: #888;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 0.6px;
      margin-bottom: 18px;
    }

    .lead-byline strong {
      color: #b80000;
      font-weight: 700;
    }

    /* ── FIX #2: Richer image placeholder ─────────────── */
    .lead-image-placeholder {
      width: 100%;
      height: 440px;
      background:
        linear-gradient(180deg,
          #3a6186 0%,
          #5a8faf 30%,
          #89c0d0 48%,
          #c9a96e 52%,
          #8b5e3c 68%,
          #5a3a1a 100%
        );
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: flex-end;
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    /* Sun disc */
    .lead-image-placeholder::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 12%;
      left: 50%;
      transform: translateX(-50%);
      width: 72px;
      height: 72px;
      background: radial-gradient(circle, #ffe97a 0%, #f7b731 55%, transparent 100%);
      border-radius: 50%;
      opacity: 0.85;
      z-index: 1;
    }

    /* Horizon silhouette band */
    .lead-image-placeholder::after {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      bottom: 0;
      left: 0;
      right: 0;
      height: 38%;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 30% 60% at 15% 100%, #2a1800 0%, transparent 100%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 20% 80% at 40% 100%, #1e1200 0%, transparent 100%),

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>The Daily Ledger</title>
  <style>
    /* ── RESET ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    /* ── BASE ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
    body {
      font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
      background: #f2ede4;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      font-size: 16px;
      line-height: 1.55;
    }

    /* ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       MASTHEAD
    ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .masthead {
      background: #fff;
      text-align: center;
      padding: 28px 60px 0;
    }

    .masthead-inner {
      border-top: 4px solid #1a1a1a;
      border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;
      padding: 18px 0 16px;
      margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    .site-title {
      font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;
      font-size: 80px;
      font-weight: 900;
      letter-spacing: -2px;
      color: #1a1a1a;
      line-height: 1;
      display: block;
    }

    .dateline {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
      font-size: 12px;
      color: #777;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: 1.8px;
      margin-top: 8px;
      display: block;
    }

    /* ── NAV ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .site-nav {

      justify-content: center;
      align-items: stretch;
      gap: 0;

    .site-nav a {
      font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;

      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: 2px;

      color: #e8e8e8;
      text-decoration: none;
      padding: 13px 40px;
      display: block;
      border-right: 1px solid #333;
      transition: background 0.18s, color 0.18s;

    .site-nav a:first-child { border-left: 1px solid #333; }
    .site-nav a:hover { background: #b80000; color: #fff; }

    .content-wrapper {

    .section-label {

    }

    .main-grid {
